title: Calcutta HC reserves order on TMC's plea against exclusion of State employees from vote counting supervisor duty
description: The Calcutta High Court on Thursday reserved its orders on a petition moved by the Trinamool Congress (TMC) against Chief Electoral Officer's decision to deploy only Central government employees as vote counting supervisors for the assembly elections in West Bengal.As per the ECI, the combined poll-percentage over the two-phases was 92.47 percent. The votes will be counted on May 4. Justice Krishna Rao heard detailed arguments of counsel representing the TMC and ECI and reserved the decisio
